{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":173057,"duration_api_ms":139437,"num_turns":30,"result":"Step 3 완료. 구현 결과를 요약합니다.

---

**산출물**

- `src/components/room/BearStatusBar.tsx` — `label: string | null` prop을 받는 순수 서버 컴포넌트. `role="status"` + `aria-live="polite"` + `aria-atomic="true"` 적용. label이 null이면 공백으로 레이아웃 자리 유지.

- `src/components/room/LastReadNote.tsx` — `lastReadAt`(UTC ISO)과 `now`(테스트 주입용) prop 수신. `formatElapsed`로 경과 계산, 파싱 실패/null 시 "아직 독서 기록이 없어요" 폴백. 시각 부분은 `<time dateTime>` 래핑.

- `src/app/page.tsx` — 회원일 때 `getLastReadAtFromSupabase` + `computeBearState`로 `bearLabel`/`bearAsset` 파생 후 SSR. 레이아웃: GuestBanner → `BearStatusBar` → flex-1 씬 → `LastReadNote` 3단 구조.

두 컴포넌트 모두 CSS 변수만 사용(`text-[var(--color-text-secondary)]`), 하드코드 hex·`rounded-*`·고정 높이 없음. 총 385개 테스트 통과, build/lint 에러 없음.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"cd38f9ab-4a93-4230-8653-e17bad679257","total_cost_usd":1.0929893999999998,"usage":{"input_tokens":28,"cache_creation_input_tokens":87784,"cache_read_input_tokens":2178768,"output_tokens":7339,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":87784,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":415,"cache_read_input_tokens":99488,"cache_creation_input_tokens":199,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":199},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-sonnet-4-6":{"inputTokens":28,"outputTokens":7339,"cacheReadInputTokens":2178768,"cacheCreationInputTokens":87784,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":1.0929893999999998,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"2ad8ba00-506f-4a6b-a312-8dffa8d7bd2a"}
